Terms & Conditions

Last Updated: March 19, 2026

IMPORTANT LEGAL NOTICE: TaxSense is a financial estimation tool. All figures, tax calculations, and projections provided are informational estimates only. They do not constitute professional financial, legal, or tax advice.

1. Agreement to Terms

By accessing or using the TaxSense application ("the App"), you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you may not access the service.

2. Use of Estimates

The App provides projections based on current UK HMRC tax guidelines. However, tax laws are complex and subject to change. TaxSense Accountants Limited makes no guarantees regarding the absolute accuracy of these calculations for your specific circumstances.

  • Never use App projections as the sole basis for filing tax returns.
  • Consult with a qualified tax professional or HMRC before making major financial decisions.
  • We are not responsible for any underpayment or overpayment of tax resulting from reliance on App data.

3. Data Privacy & Security

Your privacy is paramount. TaxSense utilizes a local-first data architecture. Your financial entries remain on your device unless you explicitly opt-in to Cloud Sync (encrypted via Firebase).

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and for all activities that occur under your account.

4. Pro Subscription

Pro features are billed on a subscription basis. These are processed via Apple App Store (RevenueCat). Subscriptions will automatically renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.

5. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, TaxSense Accountants Limited shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues.

6. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of any material changes via in-app notifications.

7. Contact Us

If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at info@taxsense.app.
